overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a cowboy character riding a horse through rolling grassland terrain. The character travels along a rocky ridge, descends into open prairie where birds fly overhead, and approaches a group of wild horses grazing near a distant smoke column.

events.description: horse jumps down from a rocky ledge to lower terrain

agents.ego_description: riding a horse along a grassy ridge, navigating around rocky outcrops on the right

entered.detail: tan rocky outcrop forming a wall along the right side of the path
thin column of dark smoke rising vertically in the distant landscape
sparse green trees dotting the left hillside in the distance
tall green grass covering the rolling terrain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a cowboy riding along a grassy hillside. A rocky cliff face runs along the right side while open grassland stretches to the left. In the distance, a thin column of smoke rises against the partly cloudy sky. Around the 12-second mark, the horse jumps down from a small ledge, continuing forward through the tall grass.

events.description: flock of birds flies across the sky overhead

agents.ego_description: galloping through open grassland toward the distant smoke column

entered.detail: low green shrubs and yucca plants scattered on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Having descended from the ridge, the rider now traverses open prairie grassland. The rocky terrain has fallen away, replaced by rolling green hills. The smoke column appears closer and more centered in the frame. At approximately 24 seconds, a flock of birds flies overhead across the blue sky. Sparse bushes and yucca plants dot the landscape as the trees on the left grow nearer.

events.description: group of wild horses becomes visible grazing on the hillside ahead
slows down while navigating through the herd of horses

agents.ego_description: approaching and moving through a group of wild horses, slowing to navigate among them

notable_agents.action: group of wild horses grazing and standing in the tall grass ahead
brown horse grazing peacefully near the path

segments.scene_description: The rider continues across the prairie and begins approaching a group of wild horses grazing on the hillside. The animals become visible around the 40-second mark, scattered across the path ahead. The rider slows down to navigate through the herd, passing close to a brown horse grazing on the left. The smoke column remains visible in the distance as the trees on the left draw nearer to the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a rider travels from a rocky hillside down into an open prairie toward a grazing herd of wild horses. It begins with the cowboy riding along a grassy ridge beside a rocky cliff face, with a thin column of smoke visible in the distance before the horse jumps down from a small ledge. As the rider descends, the rocky terrain gives way to rolling green hills and open grassland, where a flock of birds flies overhead across a blue sky. The scene then shifts as the rider approaches a group of wild horses scattered across the hillside, slowing down to navigate through the animals. Finally, the camera passes close to a grazing brown horse while the distant smoke column and nearby trees frame the path ahead.
